entries.name: auth-purge-mfa-challenges
entries.purpose: Every 5 minutes: hard-delete MFA challenges past their 1h purge window. Short cadence because challenges have short TTL + high volume.

entries.name: auth-purge-reset-tokens
entries.purpose: Every 5 minutes: hard-delete password reset tokens past their 24h purge window.

entries.name: auth-purge-cross-app-grants
entries.purpose: Every 15 minutes: hard-delete cross-app grants past their 24h purge window. Fires CrossAppGrantExpired for unconsumed rows.

entries.name: auth-purge-refresh-tokens
entries.purpose: Every 30 minutes: hard-delete refresh tokens past their 90-day purge window. Batched 5000 rows per invocation.

entries.name: auth-purge-verification-tokens
entries.purpose: Daily 03:00 UTC: hard-delete email verification tokens past their 30-day purge window.

entries.name: auth-purge-jwt-deny-list
entries.purpose: Daily 03:00 UTC: hard-delete JWT deny-list entries whose underlying JWT has expired naturally.

entries.name: auth-rotate-jwt-keys
entries.purpose: Monthly on the 1st at 04:00 UTC: rotate signing keys whose (rotated_at + 30 days) < now(). New key active immediately; old key retired but verify-capable for auth.jwt.rotation_grace_period_days.

entries.name: auth-impersonation-active-gauge
entries.purpose: Every minute: emit the impersonation-active gauge. Non-zero on evening / weekend hours triggers ops investigation.
